title: hide()
text: hide() Hide the View by removing it from its parent element. unifaceViewObject . hide() Return Value None Description When a View is first created using uniface.Instance.createView , it is automatically displayed in the specified parent element. You can use hide() to remove it from the its parent element, but the View itself remains available. It can be shown again using uniface.View.show() . Note: This function does not work with the default view that is automatically created by the weblayout ProcScript command. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
